results.title: James Scott 'ecstatic' to be back coaching Bowman Academy boys basketball
results.description: James Scott is "ecstatic" to be back with Bowman Academy boys basketball — the program where he got his start as a coach more than 15 years ago.
results.source: The Times Of Northwest Indiana | Breaking News | R

results.title: Papio South center Addison Medeck commits to Nebraska women's basketball
results.description: Nebraska women's basketball got its second commit of the 2027 recruiting class from the state's top-rated center, who averaged 12.2 rebounds per game last season.

results.title: A look at reporter Allison Brophy Champion’s best articles
results.description: ‘Dad, I’m going to the League'—Maliq Brown drafted by Spurs

results.title: Quick thoughts and notes on every player the Packers added to their 90-man roster during the 2026 offseason
results.description: Green Bay has 27 new players on the 90-man roster, including unrestricted and street free agents, draft picks, veterans acquired via trade, and undrafted rookies.

results.title: World meets DART: FIFA World Cup fans ‘pleasantly surprised’ with North Texas public transit
results.description: FIFA World Cup fans have been heavily relying on public transportation in North Texas as matches introduce tourists and locals to DART and the TRE.

results.title: Mexico fans warn England they’re ‘already 1-0 up’ ahead of World Cup clash at Estadio Azteca
results.description: Mexican supporters are feeling confident ahead of their Round of 16 match against England at the Estadio Azteca. Mexico comfortably beat Ecuador 2-0 in the last round, whereas England narrowly escaped defeat against DR Congo.
